761.title: Two buoys mored abreast in a channel

revisions.*:
'''2-6-140

No English Term (2009: Gate )

Term used of two buoys, one to port, the other to starboard, moored abreast in a channel.

(Fig. 55a)

[[Image:Ch2_Fig55.jpg|400px|border]]
